revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{{_demospace|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}|Template|Module={{Mbox | type = delete | image = none | text = '''This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is currently being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with [[{{{merge}}}]]|[[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|deleted]]}}.'''
This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with another {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}|removed from the pages on which it is currently used}}, after which it will be {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|redirected or deleted|deleted}}. '''Please check [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] for any additional instructions'''. {{#if:{{{merge|}}}||Please do not use it on any additional pages, but do not remove it from pages if it is under [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]].}} The decision to {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merge|delete}} this template was made following [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}|this discussion initiated on {{Date|{{YMD to ISO|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}}}|dmy}}]] at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Templates for discussion]].{{#if:{{{merge|}}}|
'''Note''': Please review this template's instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any type of merging.|
'''[[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]]''': Please review this {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}'s instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any action.}} }}{{#if:{{{nocat|yes [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}||}} |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |infobox|box|sidebar=
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
|#default =
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
}} }}{{urlencode:[[WP:CSD#G6|G6]]: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}]]}}{{uc:{{{criterion}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia templates currently being merged or deleted]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#switch:{{{_demospace|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}|Template|Module={{Mbox | type = delete | image = none | text = '''This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is currently being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with [[{{{merge}}}]]|[[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|deleted]]}}.'''
This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with another {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}|removed from the pages on which it is currently used}}, after which it will be {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|redirected or deleted|deleted}}. '''Please check [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] for any additional instructions'''. {{#if:{{{merge|}}}||Please do not use it on any additional pages, but do not remove it from pages if it is under [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]].}} The decision to {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merge|delete}} this template was made following [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}|this discussion initiated on {{Date|{{YMD to ISO|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}}}|dmy}}]] at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Templates for discussion]].{{#if:{{{merge|}}}|
'''Note''': Please review this template's instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any type of merging.|
'''[[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]]''': Please review this {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}'s instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any action.}} }}{{#if:{{{nocat|yes [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}||}} |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |infobox|box|sidebar=
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
|#default =
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
}} }}{{urlencode:[[WP:CSD#G6|G6]]: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}]]}}{{uc:{{{criterion}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia templates currently being merged or deleted]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23703150061|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Being_deleted here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#switch:{{{_demospace|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}|Template|Module={{Mbox | type = delete | image = none | text = '''This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is currently being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with [[{{{merge}}}]]|[[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|deleted]]}}.'''
This {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged with another {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}|removed from the pages on which it is currently used}}, after which it will be {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|redirected or deleted|deleted}}. '''Please check [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] for any additional instructions'''. {{#if:{{{merge|}}}||Please do not use it on any additional pages, but do not remove it from pages if it is under [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]].}} The decision to {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merge|delete}} this template was made following [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}|this discussion initiated on {{Date|{{YMD to ISO|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}}}|dmy}}]] at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Templates for discussion]].{{#if:{{{merge|}}}|
'''Note''': Please review this template's instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any type of merging.|
'''[[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]]''': Please review this {{#if:{{{module|}}}|module|template}}'s instructions at [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Holding cell]] before proceeding with any action.}} }}{{#if:{{{nocat|yes}}}||}} |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |infobox|box|sidebar=
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
|#default =
‹ The {{#if:{{{module|}}}|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} below {{#if:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|([[{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{module|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}]])}} is being {{#if:{{{merge|}}}|merged|deleted}}. See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:1|{{{module|{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}|templates for discussion]] for the discussion that led to this result. ›
}} }}{{urlencode:[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/{{Date|{{{date|{{{1}}}}}}|ymd}}#{{#if:{{{template|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{template|{{{2}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{module|}}}|{{{module}}}|Template:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}]]}}{{uc:{{{criterion}}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Wikipedia templates with consensus to merge or delete]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
